calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Submit To Demand For Independent Medical Examination As Noticed
Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Frederick Dixon Brooke III's Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Submit to Demand for Independent Medical Examination is OFF CALENDAR.

Defendant has not demonstrated he timely filed his motion. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) [motion must be filed and served 16 court days before hearing]; Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a) [service by mail where place of address and place of mailing are within State of adds 5 calendar days to the period of notice]; see Code of Civil Procedure section 1010.6(a)(3)(B) [service by email adds two court days to "any period of notice"]; Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(e) [service by fax only be agreement and adds two court days to "any period of notice"].) Defendant filed his motion on 3/6/2026, which is not 16 court days before 3/19/2026, the hearing date noticed. (the court has confirmed the motion was submitted for filing on 3/6/2026 as well.) Defendant's disregard for the rules is not excused.

A party seeking to have a motion heard outside the regular noticed period must secure an order shortening time or advancing the hearing. Defendant has no such order and, therefore, his effort to jump the line fails and his untimely motion is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-23-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
